testcase.name: test_frontend_field_names_match_service_config

failure.message: AssertionError: Service emi: backend expects 'operator' but frontend doesn't send it. Frontend fields: ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', 'emi_amount'] assert 'operator' in ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', ...]

testcase.failure: tests/test_eko_bbps_field_mapping.py:339: in test_frontend_field_names_match_service_config assert field in frontend_fields, f"Service {service}: backend expects '{field}' but frontend doesn't send it. Frontend fields: {frontend_fields}" E AssertionError: Service emi: backend expects 'operator' but frontend doesn't send it. Frontend fields: ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', 'emi_amount'] E assert 'operator' in ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', ...]

testcase.name: test_emi_operator_field_present

failure.message:
Failed: CRITICAL BUG FOUND: EMI service doesn't send 'operator' or 'operator_id' field!
Frontend fields: ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', 'emi_amount']
Backend expects: details.get("operator_id") or details.get("operator")
FIX OPTIONS: 1. Add 'operator' field to EMI frontend config 2. Map 'bank_name' to 'operator' in frontend before sending 3. Change backend to extract operator from selected_lender.operator_id

testcase.failure: tests/test_eko_bbps_field_mapping.py:356: in test_emi_operator_field_present pytest.fail(""" E Failed: E CRITICAL BUG FOUND: EMI service doesn't send 'operator' or 'operator_id' field! E E Frontend fields: ['loan_account', 'bank_name', 'ifsc_code', 'borrower_name', 'mobile', 'loan_type', 'emi_amount'] E E Backend expects: details.get("operator_id") or details.get("operator") E E FIX OPTIONS: E 1. Add 'operator' field to EMI frontend config E 2. Map 'bank_name' to 'operator' in frontend before sending E 3. Change backend to extract operator from selected_lender.operator_id
